Story: As a registered customer, I want to log in to my account so that I can access my dashboard.
Criteria:
Given the user is on the login page
When the user enters valid username "testuser"
And the user enters valid password "password123"
And clicks the login button
Then the user should be redirected to the dashboard

Story: As a guest user, I want to see an error when logging in with wrong password so that my account remains secure.
Criteria:
Given the user is on the login page
When the user enters username "testuser"
And enters incorrect password "wrongpass"
And clicks the login button
Then the user should see an error message "Invalid credentials"

Story: As a new user, I want to create an account so that I can log in.
Criteria:
Given the user is on the registration page
When the user enters username "newuser"
And enters email "newuser@example.com"
And enters password "SecurePass123"
And clicks the sign up button
Then the user should see a success message "Account created successfully"

Story: As a logged-in user, I want to log out so that I can protect my session.
Criteria:
Given the user is on the dashboard
When the user clicks the logout button
Then the user should be redirected to the home page

Story: As a user, I want to reset my forgotten password so that I can regain access.
Criteria:
Given the user is on the forgot password page
When the user enters email "reset@example.com"
And clicks the send reset link button
Then the user should see a confirmation message "Reset link sent"

Story: As a customer, I want to update my profile details so that my information is correct.
Criteria:
Given the user is on the profile page
When the user enters new nickname "SuperTester"
And clicks the save profile button
Then the user should see a toast notification "Profile updated"

Story: As a user, I want to enable dark mode so that the screen is easier on my eyes.
Criteria:
Given the user is on the settings page
When the user toggles the dark mode switch
Then the user interface should switch to dark colors

Story: As a shopper, I want to search for items by keyword so that I can find what I want.
Criteria:
Given the user is on the shop page
When the user types "laptop" in the search bar
And clicks the search button
Then the search results page should show matching items

Story: As an online buyer, I want to add products to my cart so that I can purchase them.
Criteria:
Given the user is on a product detail page
When the user clicks the add to cart button
Then the cart badge should update to show "1" item

Story: As a buyer, I want to remove items from my cart so that I do not buy them by mistake.
Criteria:
Given the user is on the cart page
When the user clicks the remove item button
Then the cart should display "Your cart is empty"

Story: As a customer, I want to update the quantity of items in my cart so that I get the correct amount.
Criteria:
Given the user is on the cart page
When the user changes the quantity to "3"
Then the cart subtotal should automatically recalculate

Story: As a user, I want to filter products by category so that I can browse specific items.
Criteria:
Given the user is on the shop page
When the user selects category "Electronics"
Then only electronics products should be displayed

Story: As a shopper, I want to sort search results by price so that I can find the cheapest options.
Criteria:
Given the user is on the search results page
When the user selects sort option "Price: Low to High"
Then the items should be ordered ascending by price

Story: As a checkout user, I want to enter my shipping address so that my order can be delivered.
Criteria:
Given the user is on the checkout shipping page
When the user enters street "123 Main St"
And enters city "Seattle"
And enters zipcode "98101"
And clicks continue to payment
Then the user should be redirected to the payment page

Story: As a checkout user, I want to pay with credit card so that my purchase is processed.
Criteria:
Given the user is on the checkout payment page
When the user enters card number "4111222233334444"
And enters expiry "12/28"
And enters CVV "123"
And clicks the place order button
Then the user should be redirected to the order success page

Story: As a customer, I want to see my order history so that I can track previous purchases.
Criteria:
Given the user is on the account dashboard
When the user clicks on the order history link
Then the page should display a list of past orders

Story: As a user, I want to subscribe to the newsletter so that I can receive updates.
Criteria:
Given the user is on the home page
When the user enters email "subscribe@example.com" in newsletter input
And clicks the subscribe button
Then the page should show message "Thank you for subscribing"

Story: As a dashboard user, I want to change my account email so that I can receive emails elsewhere.
Criteria:
Given the user is on the settings page
When the user enters new email "newemail@example.com"
And enters current password "password123"
And clicks change email button
Then the user should see message "Verification email sent"

Story: As a premium user, I want to download my PDF invoice so that I can keep local copy.
Criteria:
Given the user is on the billing page
When the user clicks the download invoice button
Then a PDF invoice download should begin

Story: As a user, I want to delete my account so that my data is removed.
Criteria:
Given the user is on the account settings page
When the user clicks delete account
And confirms the deletion modal
Then the account should be deactivated
And the user is redirected to the home page

Story: As an admin, I want to view the list of registered users so that I can manage them.
Criteria:
Given the user is logged in as admin
When the user navigates to the admin panel
Then the page should display the user management table

Story: As an admin, I want to ban a user so that I can moderate community.
Criteria:
Given the user is on the admin user management page
When the user clicks the ban button next to user "spammer1"
Then the user status should update to "Banned"

Story: As a user, I want to contact customer support so that I can get help.
Criteria:
Given the user is on the support page
When the user enters subject "Broken Link"
And enters description "The dashboard link is broken"
And clicks the submit ticket button
Then the user should see "Ticket submitted successfully"

Story: As a customer, I want to add items to my wishlist so that I can buy them later.
Criteria:
Given the user is on a product page
When the user clicks the add to wishlist button
Then the item should be saved in the wishlist folder

Story: As a shopper, I want to apply a promo code so that I get a discount.
Criteria:
Given the user is on the checkout page
When the user enters promo code "DISCOUNT20"
And clicks the apply code button
Then the total price should be reduced by 20%

Story: As a user, I want to see real-time chat support so that I can ask quick questions.
Criteria:
Given the user is on the website home page
When the user clicks the support chat bubble
Then the live chat box should expand

Story: As a merchant, I want to upload a product image so that customers can see it.
Criteria:
Given the user is on the merchant dashboard
When the user selects product image file "laptop.png"
And clicks the upload product image button
Then the product image preview should update

Story: As a dashboard user, I want to view my API keys so that I can integrate my apps.
Criteria:
Given the user is on the API developer portal
When the user clicks show api key button
Then the API key string should be revealed

Story: As a developer, I want to regenerate my API key so that I can rotate credentials.
Criteria:
Given the user is on the developer portal
When the user clicks regenerate secret key
Then the old key should be invalidated and new key displayed

Story: As a user, I want to write a product review so that I can share my experience.
Criteria:
Given the user is on the product reviews tab
When the user selects 5 stars rating
And writes comment "Excellent quality!"
And clicks submit review
Then the review should appear in the list

Story: As a customer, I want to track my shipped package so that I know when it arrives.
Criteria:
Given the user is on the order details page
When the user clicks track delivery button
Then the tracking status roadmap should appear

Story: As a manager, I want to export sales report as CSV so that I can run local analytics.
Criteria:
Given the user is on the analytics panel
When the user clicks export CSV report
Then a CSV spreadsheet download should start

Story: As a user, I want to disable email notifications so that my inbox is clean.
Criteria:
Given the user is on the notification settings tab
When the user unchecks receive marketing emails
And clicks save choices
Then the preferences should be saved successfully

Story: As a buyer, I want to select billing same as shipping so that I do not retype.
Criteria:
Given the user is on the payment page
When the user checks the same as shipping checkbox
Then the billing address fields should match shipping details

Story: As a mobile reader, I want the sidebar to collapse so that it doesn't block content.
Criteria:
Given the user is on the dashboard on a mobile screen
When the user clicks the toggle sidebar button
Then the sidebar panel should collapse out of view

Story: As a user, I want to choose my language preference so that I can read comfortably.
Criteria:
Given the user is on the profile settings page
When the user selects language "Spanish"
Then the website labels should translate to Spanish

Story: As a moderator, I want to delete flag comments so that I can maintain community rules.
Criteria:
Given the user is on the moderation panel
When the user clicks delete on flagged comment ID "404"
Then the comment should be removed from database

Story: As a merchant, I want to set custom discount percentages so that I can run sales.
Criteria:
Given the user is on the inventory control page
When the user updates discount field to "15%"
And clicks update inventory
Then the product discount status should register

Story: As a user, I want to see notification count badges so that I notice updates.
Criteria:
Given the user has unread notifications
When the user loads the dashboard
Then the bell icon should display badge "3"

Story: As a customer, I want to clear search history so that I can maintain privacy.
Criteria:
Given the user clicks search box input
When the user clicks clear search history link
Then the recent searches list should be cleared

Story: As a traveler, I want to enter departure dates so that I can search flights.
Criteria:
Given the user is on the flight search interface
When the user selects departure date "2026-06-01"
And clicks search flights button
Then flights scheduled on that date should be listed

Story: As a traveler, I want to choose window seat so that I can view the flight.
Criteria:
Given the user is on the seat selection map
When the user clicks seat "12A"
Then the seat selection summary should show window seat

Story: As a system administrator, I want to toggle maintenance mode so that I can perform updates.
Criteria:
Given the user is logged into admin settings portal
When the user checks maintenance mode option
Then a warning message "System entering maintenance mode" should be shown

Story: As a blogger, I want to save posts as draft so that I can finish them later.
Criteria:
Given the user is on the blog draft editor
When the user clicks save as draft button
Then the draft status should update to "Draft Saved"

Story: As a customer, I want to buy a gift card so that I can send it to friends.
Criteria:
Given the user is on the gift cards menu
When the user enters recipient email "friend@example.com"
And enters gift amount "50"
And clicks purchase gift card
Then the card purchase checkout should trigger

Story: As a reader, I want to search articles by category tag so that I find relevant posts.
Criteria:
Given the user is on the blog home page
When the user clicks the tag "React"
Then only articles tagged with React should be shown

Story: As a dashboard user, I want to see memory usage logs so that I can monitor server health.
Criteria:
Given the user is on system logs dashboard
When the user clicks performance monitoring tab
Then the server CPU and memory usage charts should render

Story: As a premium member, I want to invite friends to my team so that we can collaborate.
Criteria:
Given the user is on the team workspace management page
When the user enters colleague email "colleague@example.com"
And clicks send invite button
Then the user list should show invitation status "Pending"

Story: As a team member, I want to accept my team invitation so that I can join workspace.
Criteria:
Given the user opens the team invite link
When the user clicks accept invitation button
Then the user should see workspace dashboard

Story: As a customer, I want to edit review stars rating so that I can update my review.
Criteria:
Given the user is on my reviews list
When the user clicks edit on review ID "12"
And updates rating to "4 stars"
And clicks save review changes
Then the review rating should be updated
